texto: It was like some mad scientist threw a bunch of DNA into a blender and this is what came out. What the heck could it be? Was it some kind of alien? A scientific experiment gone horribly wrong? Did we have a Dr. Frankenstein living in Billings? Seriously, the creature looked like a resurrected Wookiee made from spare parts.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Kendra C. Highley: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a vida. O trecho “It was like some mad scientist threw a bunch of DNA into a blender and this is what came out. Wha…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que vida, horror, monsters pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e monsters.
